name: awesome-claude-skills
description: A curated collection of community skills for Claude Code, including productivity tools, content creation, development utilities, and app integrations

plugins.name: artifacts-builder
plugins.description: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component HTML artifacts using React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui

plugins.name: brand-guidelines
plugins.description: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to artifacts for consistent visual identity

plugins.name: canvas-design
plugins.description: Create beautiful visual art in PNG and PDF documents using design philosophy for posters, art, and static pieces

plugins.name: changelog-generator
plugins.description: Automatically creates user-facing changelogs from git commits by analyzing history and categorizing changes

plugins.name: competitive-ads-extractor
plugins.description: Extracts and analyzes competitors' ads from ad libraries to understand messaging and creative approaches

plugins.name: connect
plugins.description: Connect Claude to any app. Send emails, create issues, post messages, update databases across 1000+ services

plugins.name: connect-apps
plugins.description: Connect Claude to external apps like Gmail, Slack, GitHub for sending emails, creating issues, posting messages

plugins.name: connect-apps-plugin
plugins.description: Let Claude perform real actions in 500+ apps. Handles auth and connections using Composio

plugins.name: content-research-writer
plugins.description: Assists in writing high-quality content by conducting research, adding citations, improving hooks, and providing feedback

plugins.name: developer-growth-analysis
plugins.description: Analyzes Claude Code chat history to identify coding patterns, development gaps, and curate learning resources

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Working with documents including DOCX, PDF, PPTX, and XLSX creation, editing, and formatting

plugins.name: domain-name-brainstormer
plugins.description: Generates creative domain name ideas and checks availability across multiple TLDs

plugins.name: file-organizer
plugins.description: Intelligently organizes files and folders by understanding context, finding duplicates, suggesting better structures

plugins.name: image-enhancer
plugins.description: Improves image quality by enhancing resolution, sharpness, and clarity

plugins.name: internal-comms
plugins.description: Resources for writing internal communications including status reports, leadership updates, newsletters, and incident reports

plugins.name: invoice-organizer
plugins.description: Automatically organizes invoices and receipts for tax preparation by extracting info, renaming, and sorting

plugins.name: langsmith-fetch
plugins.description: Debug LangChain/LangGraph agents by fetching execution traces from LangSmith Studio

plugins.name: lead-research-assistant
plugins.description: Identifies high-quality leads by analyzing your business, searching for target companies, and providing contact strategies

plugins.name: mcp-builder
plugins.description: Guide for creating high-quality MCP servers to integrate external APIs and services with LLMs

plugins.name: meeting-insights-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyzes meeting transcripts to uncover behavioral patterns, communication insights, and actionable feedback

plugins.name: raffle-winner-picker
plugins.description: Picks random winners from lists, spreadsheets, or Google Sheets for giveaways and contests

plugins.name: skill-creator
plugins.description: Guide for creating effective skills that extend Claude's capabilities with specialized knowledge and workflows

plugins.name: skill-share
plugins.description: Creates new Claude skills and automatically shares them on Slack for team collaboration

plugins.name: slack-gif-creator
plugins.description: Toolkit for creating animated GIFs optimized for Slack with size validators and composable animation primitives

plugins.name: tailored-resume-generator
plugins.description: Analyzes job descriptions and generates tailored resumes highlighting relevant experience and skills

plugins.name: theme-factory
plugins.description: Toolkit for styling artifacts with themes including 10 pre-set themes with colors and fonts

plugins.name: twitter-algorithm-optimizer
plugins.description: Analyze and optimize tweets for maximum reach using Twitter's open-source algorithm insights

plugins.name: video-downloader
plugins.description: Download YouTube videos with customizable quality and format options

plugins.name: webapp-testing
plugins.description: Toolkit for testing local web applications using Playwright with screenshots, browser logs, and UI verification
